# Vendored libraries

Self-contained copies (no CDN dependency — the dashboard works offline on a LAN):

| File | Library | Version | License |
|------|---------|---------|---------|
| `epub.min.js` | [epub.js](https://github.com/futurepress/epub.js) | 0.3.x line (minified UMD build; exact version not recorded in the artifact) | BSD-2-Clause |
| `jszip.min.js` | [JSZip](https://stuartk.com/jszip) | 3.10.1 | MIT / GPLv3 dual |

To upgrade: replace the file with the new minified build and update this table.
